name: Boots of Swiftness
simpleDescription: Enhances Move Speed and reduces the effect of slows

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Fleetfooted is a constant passive that continuously scales down incoming slow intensity by 25% while the item is equipped.
Player-visible behavior: this effect does not require activation and applies immediately to all incoming slows.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
